subject: [COMMON][DGBUILDER] Simplify cert retrieval script
commit_message:
[COMMON][DGBUILDER] Simplify cert retrieval script

As retrieving values is now done via a generic script, let's clean a
little bit cert retrieval in order to remove unneeded part.

Issue-ID: OOM-2688
Signed-off-by: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>
Change-Id: I497fdfd919dfa1059782deb1a092113ba417d06c
